zh.Preston-next-Wingham, Kent: 英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Sandwich於大約1220年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Simon de Sandwich of Preston27歲，母親Juliana de Kent21歲。他於1245年與Joan Auberville在英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年12月在英國享年108歲。

zh-hans.Preston-next-Wingham, Kent: 英国英格兰肯特普雷斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Sandwich于大约1220年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Simon de Sandwich of Preston27岁，母亲Juliana de Kent21岁。他于1245年与Joan Auberville在英国英格兰肯特普雷斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年12月在英国享年108岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sandwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian   Sandvik   or   Sandvig  .
English (mainly Durham): from Sandwick in Martindale (Westmorland), from Old English sand or Old Norse sandr ‘sand’ + Old Norse vík ‘creek, bay’.

variants.name: Sandvik
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Anders, Bente, Lars, Morten, Ottar, Thorleif.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements sand ‘sand’ + vik ‘bay’, ‘inlet’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Sandwich was born about 1220, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Sandwich of Preston, was 27 and his mother, Juliana de Kent, was 21. He married Joan Auberville in 1245, in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in December 1327, in England, at the age of 108.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Sandwich est né environ 1220, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Sandwich of Preston, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Kent, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan Auberville en 1245, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1327, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 108 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Sandwich um 1220 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Sandwich of Preston 27 und seine Mutter Juliana de Kent 21. Er hat 1245 in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom Joan Auberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1327 im Alter von 108 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Sandwich è nato il circa 1220 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Sandwich of Preston, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Kent, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan Auberville nel 1245, nel Preston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1327, nel England, all'età di 108 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Sandwichが約1220年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Simon de Sandwich of Prestonは27歳，母Juliana de Kentは21歳であった。1245年にイギリスイギリスケントプレストンでJoan Aubervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年12月にイギリスで108歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Sandwich(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Sandwich of Preston(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Kent(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 프레스턴에서 Joan Auberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 12월 영국에서 108세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Preston-next-Wingham, Kent: Preston, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Sandwich nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Sandwich of Preston, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Kent, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Auberville em 1245, em Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1327, em Inglaterra, com 108 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Sandwich родился около 1220 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Sandwich of Preston было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Kent, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Auberville в 1245 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1327 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 108 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Sandwich nació aproximadamente 1220, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Sandwich of Preston, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Juliana de Kent, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan Auberville en 1245, en Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1327, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 108 años.
